title: The Hidden Grimoire
description: Use all the evidence to deduce the mixing results.

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing3 and ing8, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing3=R+ (ing3+ing6=R+: both share R+), ing8=R- (ing8 has R-)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing3=G+ (ing3+ing7=G+: both share G+), ing8=G- (ing8 has G-)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing3=B- (ing3 has B-), ing8=B+ (ing6+ing8=B+: both share B+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  All colours opposite → neutral.

To find the result of mixing ing1 and ing3, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing1=R+ (ing1 has R+), ing3=R+ (ing3+ing6=R+: both share R+)
      → SAME sign + → R+ resolves.

To find the result of mixing ing1 and ing6, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing1=R+ (ing1 has R+), ing6=R+ (ing3+ing6=R+: both share R+)
      → SAME sign + → R+ resolves.
